meaning: vt.用公式表示,明确地表达,作简洁陈述v.阐明
examples: Governments need to formulate energy policies that promote economically and environmentally sound development.
Computers increasingly become principal actors in leveraging data to formulate questions, which requires radically new ways of reasoning.
I was impressed by the way he could formulate his ideas.
The author is right, mind keeps on spinning ideas whereby the same can formulate into realities!
All the policy makers who formulate or acquiesce to this strategy will be held harmless.
